title: Facilitator Guide — Day 9 — FEC Validation Lab™
prepChecklist: Confirm squads have 9 encoded interviews (3 per member)
Open FEC Validation Lab in SPIKE Studio for a demo squad
Review squad roles: Research Lead, FEC Lead, Pitch Lead
Test projector for interactive FEC poster (boxes 1–5 highlighted)

sessionFlow.activity: Deck — From Interviews to Venture Clarity
sessionFlow.notes: Interview evidence → squad intelligence → FEC validation → pitch.
Customer Reality, Problem Validation, UVP Stress Test. SPIKE AI generates; squads approve.
Client Experience, Strategic Opportunity, Build the Pitch.

sessionFlow.activity: Squad FEC poster review + portfolio sync check
sessionFlow.notes: Celebrate confidence score jumps on boxes 1–5.

debriefQuestions: Which FEC box shifted the most after validation?
What evidence changed your UVP from Week 1?
Is the squad pitch draft ready for Friday?
commonPitfalls: Approving AI text without reading interview evidence
One member doing all six steps while others watch
Skipping UVP stress test when evidence conflicts
coachingTips: FEC Lead owns step approvals; Research Lead owns evidence quality
Use before/after confidence scores to show venture clarity
No manual squad reports — everything syncs from SPIKE Studio
